response.justification: Candidate brings 14+ years of polyglot engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput data systems (notably Dunnhumby/Sociomantic handling millions of requests per second), plus founder-level ownership of an open-source platform. However, the resume shows no direct experience with experimentation platforms, feature flagging, A/B testing frameworks, or growth/measurement systems — the core focus of this Principal IC6 role. Title trajectory (Senior/Staff) and lack of demonstrated cross-org platform leadership at IC6 scale make this a borderline fit worth a screening call to probe experimentation depth.
strengths: 14+ years polyglot engineering across JS/TS, C/C++, Java, D, with high-scale low-latency experience at Sociomantic
Strong testing/TDD culture, workshops, and open-source platform ownership (GISCollective) showing systemic thinking
Recent AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling work aligns with AI-first engineering velocity preference
concerns: No explicit experimentation, A/B testing, feature flagging, or growth-platform experience mentioned
Limited evidence of Principal/IC6-scale cross-team architectural leadership influencing multiple orgs
Pricing/data work is closest analog to measurement systems but lacks statistical analysis or guardrail-framework depth

key_factors.factor: Depth of polyglot engineering and high-scale systems background
Unclear Principal-level cross-org leadership track record
